options.content:
Use this dashboard to track worker utilization and current async jobs.

- Running job rows show live `worker_id` with `worker_type:host:pid` split-out columns.
- `job_type` filter supports `quantlab_overlay`, `quantlab_signals`, and `stats_compute`.
- Use the logs panel to trail worker execution and overlay lifecycle events.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status = 'running' AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring});
SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued', 'retry') AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring});

panels.title: Busy QuantLab Workers
panels.description: Workers currently holding running quantlab jobs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT lock_owner)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status = 'running' AND lock_owner IS NOT NULL AND job_type IN ('quantlab_overlay', 'quantlab_signals');

panels.title: Busy Stats Workers
panels.description: Workers currently holding running stats jobs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT lock_owner)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status = 'running' AND lock_owner IS NOT NULL AND job_type = 'stats_compute';

panels.title: Workers With Active Job
panels.description: Live view of workers currently processing jobs with parsed PID.

targets.rawSql: SELECT split_part(lock_owner, ':', 1) AS worker_type, split_part(lock_owner, ':', 2) AS worker_host, NULLIF(split_part(lock_owner, ':', 3), '')::int AS worker_pid, count(*) AS running_jobs, string_agg(DISTINCT job_type, ', ' ORDER BY job_type) AS job_types, min(started_at) AS oldest_started_at, round(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - min(started_at)))::numeric, 1) AS oldest_running_seconds FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status = 'running' AND lock_owner IS NOT NULL AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY worker_type, worker_host, worker_pid;

panels.title: Current Running Jobs
panels.description: Current async jobs and payload identity fields for drilldown.

targets.rawSql: SELECT id AS job_id, job_type, status, lock_owner AS worker_id, split_part(lock_owner, ':', 1) AS worker_type, NULLIF(split_part(lock_owner, ':', 3), '')::int AS worker_pid, payload->>'inst_id' AS indicator_id, payload->>'instrument_id' AS instrument_id, payload->>'symbol' AS symbol, payload->>'interval' AS interval, payload->>'datasource' AS datasource, payload->>'exchange' AS exchange, attempts, max_attempts, started_at, round(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - started_at))::numeric, 1) AS running_seconds FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status = 'running' AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring}) ORDER BY started_at ASC;

panels.title: Queue / Retry Pressure
panels.description: Backlog by type and status. `oldest_age_s` helps spot starvation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT job_type, status, count(*) AS jobs, min(created_at) AS oldest_created_at, round(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - min(created_at)))::numeric, 1) AS oldest_age_s FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued', 'retry', 'running') AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY job_type, status;

panels.title: Workers Seen Recently
panels.description: Workers that touched jobs in the selected recent window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT lock_owner AS worker_id, split_part(lock_owner, ':', 1) AS worker_type, split_part(lock_owner, ':', 2) AS worker_host, NULLIF(split_part(lock_owner, ':', 3), '')::int AS worker_pid, count(*) AS jobs_touched, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'succeeded') AS succeeded, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS failed, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'running') AS currently_running, max(updated_at) AS last_update_at FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE lock_owner IS NOT NULL AND updated_at >= NOW() - ((${recent_minutes:raw} || ' minutes')::interval) AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 ORDER BY last_update_at DESC;

panels.title: Job Throughput (Succeeded/Failed)
panels.description: Completion events over time by job_type and terminal status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(updated_at, $__interval), (job_type || ':' || status) AS metric, count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND status IN ('succeeded', 'failed') AND (${job_type:sqlstring} = '__all' OR job_type = ${job_type:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Worker + Overlay Logs
panels.description: Trail worker lifecycle and overlay pipeline events.

options.content: Phase path tracked: `overlay_request_received` -> `overlay_build_start` -> `overlay_runtime_state_projection_start/done` -> `overlay_visibility_applied` -> `overlay_build_complete`.\n\nUse `indicator_id` for SQL job metrics and `indicator_re` for Loki phase/log drilldown.

panels.title: Overlay Job P95 (ms)
panels.description: P95 end-to-end worker execution time from async job claim to finish for overlay jobs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (finished_at - started_at)) * 1000.0))::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status = 'succeeded' AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND finished_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring});

panels.title: Overlay Failure Rate (%)
panels.description: Failed overlays out of terminal overlay jobs in the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(round((100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(count(*), 0)), 2), 0)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status IN ('succeeded', 'failed') AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring});

SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status = 'succeeded' AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring});

SELECT count(*)::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status = 'failed' AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring});

panels.title: Runtime Phase Throughput (events)
panels.description: Phase event counts over time from Loki logs.

panels.title: Overlay Job P95 Duration Trend (ms)
panels.description: P95 async overlay job duration by indicator_id.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(updated_at, $__interval), COALESCE(payload->>'inst_id', 'unknown') AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (finished_at - started_at)) * 1000.0))::double precision AS value FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status = 'succeeded' AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND finished_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Indicators With Overlay Failures
panels.description: Failure concentration and most recent error payload.

targets.rawSql: SELECT payload->>'inst_id' AS indicator_id, count(*) AS failed_jobs, max(updated_at) AS last_failed_at, left(max(error), 220) AS sample_error FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE job_type = 'quantlab_overlay' AND status = 'failed' AND $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND (${indicator_id:sqlstring} = '__all' OR payload->>'inst_id' = ${indicator_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY failed_jobs DESC, last_failed_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: Per-Indicator Runtime Logs
panels.description: Drilldown for one indicator across request/build/projection/visibility and worker failures.

list.name: job_type
list.label: Job Type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT job_type AS __value, job_type AS __text FROM portal_async_jobs ORDER BY 1;

list.name: indicator_id
list.label: Indicator ID
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT payload->>'inst_id' AS __value, payload->>'inst_id' AS __text FROM portal_async_jobs WHERE payload ? 'inst_id' AND payload->>'inst_id' <> '' ORDER BY 1;
